testcase.name: test_03_register_8_users

failure.message: AssertionError: Only registered 1 users, need 8 assert 1 >= 8 + where 1 = len([{'email': 'admin@fantapronostic.com', 'password': 'admin123', 'token': 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJmMGEwMWJiMS00YjBjLTRmNmYtOWM4ZS1hN2IzM2I0NDU2NTEiLCJyb2xlIjoiYWRtaW4iLCJ0eXBlIjoiYWNjZXNzIiwiZXhwIjoxNzczMTgxNTY1LCJpYXQiOjE3NzMxNzc5NjV9.OAygZlGs5Ktf24C3KStVmFYuBFS8mb-ON3_55cxbyJo', 'username': 'admin'}])

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_tournament_lifecycle_phase456.py:149: in test_03_register_8_users assert len(users_registered) >= 8, f"Only registered {len(users_registered)} users, need 8" E AssertionError: Only registered 1 users, need 8 E assert 1 >= 8 E + where 1 = len([{'email': 'admin@fantapronostic.com', 'password': 'admin123', 'token': 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJmMGEwMWJiMS00YjBjLTRmNmYtOWM4ZS1hN2IzM2I0NDU2NTEiLCJyb2xlIjoiYWRtaW4iLCJ0eXBlIjoiYWNjZXNzIiwiZXhwIjoxNzczMTgxNTY1LCJpYXQiOjE3NzMxNzc5NjV9.OAygZlGs5Ktf24C3KStVmFYuBFS8mb-ON3_55cxbyJo', 'username': 'admin'}])

testcase.name: test_04_verify_tournament_has_8_registrations
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_tournament_lifecycle_phase456.py:158: in test_04_verify_tournament_has_8_registrations assert data["registered_count"] >= 8, f"Only {data['registered_count']} registrations, need 8" E AssertionError: Only 1 registrations, need 8 E assert 1 >= 8

testcase.name: test_05_start_tournament
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_tournament_lifecycle_phase456.py:171: in test_05_start_tournament assert resp.status_code == 200, f"Start tournament failed: {resp.text}" E AssertionError: Start tournament failed: {"detail":"Servono 8 iscritti, ce ne sono 1"} E assert 400 == 200 E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_06_verify_groups_created

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 2 groups, got 0 assert 0 == 2 + where 0 = len([])

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_tournament_lifecycle_phase456.py:190: in test_06_verify_groups_created assert len(data) == 2, f"Expected 2 groups, got {len(data)}" E AssertionError: Expected 2 groups, got 0 E assert 0 == 2 E + where 0 = len([])

testcase.name: test_07_get_my_matchups_for_registered_user

failure.message: AssertionError: No matchups returned for registered user assert 0 > 0 + where 0 = len([])

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_tournament_lifecycle_phase456.py:211: in test_07_get_my_matchups_for_registered_user assert len(data) > 0, "No matchups returned for registered user" E AssertionError: No matchups returned for registered user E assert 0 > 0 E + where 0 = len([])

testcase.name: test_09_create_round
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_tournament_lifecycle_phase456.py:255: in test_09_create_round assert resp.status_code == 200, f"Create round failed: {resp.text}" E AssertionError: Create round failed: {"detail":"Torneo in stato registration, non si possono creare round"} E assert 400 == 200 E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_10_open_round

failure.message: AssertionError: No round created assert None

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_tournament_lifecycle_phase456.py:269: in test_10_open_round assert rid, "No round created" E AssertionError: No round created E assert None

testcase.name: test_11_get_matchup_live

failure.message: AssertionError: No matchup ID stored assert None

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_tournament_lifecycle_phase456.py:285: in test_11_get_matchup_live assert mid, "No matchup ID stored" E AssertionError: No matchup ID stored E assert None

testcase.name: test_13_complete_round

failure.message: AssertionError: No round created assert None

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_tournament_lifecycle_phase456.py:322: in test_13_complete_round assert rid, "No round created" E AssertionError: No round created E assert None

testcase.name: test_15_generate_knockout_bracket
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_tournament_lifecycle_phase456.py:355: in test_15_generate_knockout_bracket assert resp.status_code == 200, f"Generate knockout failed: {resp.text}" E AssertionError: Generate knockout failed: {"detail":"Il torneo deve essere in fase gironi"} E assert 400 == 200 E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_17_tournament_detail_has_groups

failure.message:
AssertionError: Expected knockout status, got registration assert 'registration' == 'knockout'
- knockout + registration

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_tournament_lifecycle_phase456.py:393: in test_17_tournament_detail_has_groups assert data["status"] == "knockout", f"Expected knockout status, got {data['status']}" E AssertionError: Expected knockout status, got registration E assert 'registration' == 'knockout' E E - knockout E + registration

testcase.name: test_18_tournament_detail_has_rounds
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_tournament_lifecycle_phase456.py:406: in test_18_tournament_detail_has_rounds assert len(data["rounds"]) >= 1 E assert 0 >= 1 E + where 0 = len([])
